contact.name: Pokedingus
contact.bio: We are lifelong Pokémon enthusiasts specializing in premium Pokémon cards, collectibles. Our passion is helping collectors discover authentic cards, preserve valuable pieces of the hobby, and make informed buying decisions. Whether sourcing rare vintage cards, or building high-end collections, We combine attention to detail with transparency to provide an exceptional experience for every customer.

work.title: Pokémon Card Specialist
work.description: Buy, sell, and source authentic Pokémon cards ranging from modern releases to vintage collectibles. Research market trends, population reports, and historical pricing to accurately evaluate cards. Maintain strict authenticity standards to protect collectors from counterfeits. Build lasting relationships with collectors through honest communication and exceptional customer service. Manage inventory, online sales, secure packaging, and worldwide shipping.

projects.title: Pokemon Battle Frontier
projects.description: Pokemon game in the model of Battle Ship.

projects.title: Hangman
projects.description: Hangman game based on Marvel characters.

projects.title: Infinity War
projects.description: An online game specially for the Infinity Stones.

experienceSection.quote: Helping collectors discover, preserve, and own the cards they've always dreamed of.
